results.rendered_html:
śliṣṭa p. p. [śliṣ-kta]
1 Embraced.
2 Clung, adhered to.
3 Resting or leaning on.
4 Involving a pun, susceptible of a double interpretation; a tra viṣamādayaḥ śabdāḥ śliṣṭāḥ  K. P. 10.
